system.description:
Play the Guardian if you want to take hits for your team and support them. Gain access to the Valor domain.

Foundation Features

Fortification: Once per long rest when you activate Tech Armor, gain Overshield equal to your Tier and these additional benefits until Tech Armor deactivates: resistance to physical damage, immunity to Restrained and Vulnerable, and you cannot be moved against your will.

Retaliate: When you mark a Shield Slot to reduce damage from an adversary in Close range while Tech Armor is active, they must mark a Stress.

Specialization Feature

Protector: When an ally in Very Close range would take damage, you may mark a Shield Slot to reduce the damage by one threshold.

Defense Matrix: When Tech Armor ends, clear a Shield Slot.

Mastery Feature

Tech Burst: Once per rest when Tech Armor ends, all adversaries in Very Close range must succeed on a Reaction Roll (17) or they are knocked back to Far range and become temporarily Vulnerable. Additionally, all allies in Very Close range clear one Shield Slot.
